name: Night Hag

traits.name: Confer Fire Resistance
traits.text: The nightmare can grant Resistance to Fire damage to a rider while it is on the nightmare.

traits.name: Illumination
traits.text: The nightmare sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

text:
# Night Hag

*Large Fiend, Neutral Evil*

### Actions

**Hooves.** Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.
